Mission Completion Formula: Mission completion = missions finished / missions started in selected period.
Participant Completion Formula: Participant completion = participants completed / participants enrolled total.
Active Missions Formula: Active missions = approved missions still in progress.
Total Missions Formula: Total missions = all platform missions excluding rejected and cancelled ones.
Volunteer Hours Formula: Volunteer hours = sum of participants final hours (final_hours) in completed missions.
Beneficiaries Impacted Formula: Beneficiaries impacted = sum of beneficiaries across all completed missions.
company_brisa_description: Connecting people and communities through safe, sustainable mobility. Our volunteer and CSR programs support road safety, environmental action, and social impact across Portugal.
